notes: v1.2.60: Applied capture fix files from zip - updated models.py, main_window.py, timeline.py, image_dialog.py with fixes for image capture and timeline rendering. v1.2.59: Replaced timeline implementation with fixed version from zip - new TimelineDelegate with proper QSize return from sizeHint (fixes blank rows), improved error handling, better selection handling, proper drag-drop support. v1.2.58: Added defensive checks to TimelineDelegate to prevent crashes, added try-catch in paint method with fallback error display, added getattr for action attributes. v1.2.57: Comprehensive fix - replaced ALL remaining engine.actions references with action_model throughout main_window.py (load_last_session, save_session, delete_action, duplicate_action, move_action, copy_action, paste_action, select, _apply_inspector, all editor methods, recording, export/import). v1.2.56: Fixed blank timeline issue - updated set_actions to properly update model, fixed all dialog methods to use action_model.add_action, timeline now uses shared model. v1.2.55: Full refactor - implemented reactive ActionListModel with QAbstractListModel, converted timeline from QGraphicsView to QListView with delegate, timeline now updates reactively when actions are added. v1.2.54: Reverted partial reactive model implementation - too massive for current issue. v1.2.53: Added strict validation for image_data (type check, length check), fixed extra_images defensive join, changed if act to if act is not None. v1.2.52: Added debug prints and guards to check if image data is None before use. v1.2.51: Made _do_capture synchronous - returns result directly instead of callback to prevent crash. v1.2.50: Fixed indentation error in modernized image_dialog.py that prevented dialog from opening. v1.2.49: Using user-provided modernized image_dialog.py with QDialog modal overlay approach. v1.2.48: Revert to non-modal QWidget overlay with callback - no nested exec(), no hiding parent, should fix crash. v1.2.47: Converted CaptureOverlay to QDialog with modal exec() to match v1.1.0 tkinter approach - should fix grey screen and crash issues. v1.2.46: Removed WA_ShowWithoutActivating from CaptureOverlay to fix mouse event blocking, added logging to track dialog result. v1.2.45: Using minimize() instead of hide(). v1.2.44: Removed hide/show cycle, fixed debug log truncation.
